name: Sayang
heroSubtitle: Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! May this year bring you all the joy and success you deserve.
giftMessage: Semoga semua yang kamu harapkan tahun ini bisa segera tercapai yaa, aminnn...
letterContent: On this special day, I wanted to take a moment to tell you how incredibly amazing you are. You bring so much light and joy into the lives of everyone around you.
I hope your day is filled with as much happiness as you give to others.
May all your dreams and wishes come true this year.

words.clue: Singkatan game yang sering kita mainin?

gallery.caption: Tulis ceritamu untuk foto pertama di sini...
Senyum ceria di hari yang spesial.
Tawa bahagia yang selalu aku ingat.

endingMessage: Thank you for being part of my life. I hope this little website makes you smile.
